context: Rural government school in Andhra Pradesh. Students have completed basic chemistry concepts (states of matter, elements and compounds). The regular science teacher is observing from the back of the room.
openingScene: You walk into the classroom carrying stacks of paper squares, scissors, and a rolled-up chart. The students are curious about the unusual supplies. Priya is already eyeing the scissors and whispering guesses to her neighbor. Ravi looks unimpressed — he thinks cutting paper sounds too easy. Lakshmi is sitting quietly near the window. Arjun is folding a paper airplane from his notebook. Meena has already written 'Atomic Structure' neatly at the top of her page.
